description_long: This is a disposable coffee cup with a black textured sleeve and a white plastic lid, commonly seen in urban coffee shops. The cup features bold white text reading 'GREGORYS COFFEE' on one side, and a stylized logo of a face with glasses and hair on the other. The lid is domed with a small drinking slot, designed for takeaway beverages. The cup's body appears to be made of paper or cardboard, while the lid is plastic, and the interior is likely lined with a thin layer of plastic or wax for insulation. The branding and logo are prominent, making it easily identifiable as a product from Gregorys Coffee. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for carrying hot drinks on the go.
description: A black disposable coffee cup with a white lid, featuring 'GREGORYS COFFEE' branding and a stylized face logo. The cup is textured and designed for takeaway beverages.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'GREGORYS COFFEE' text prominently on the black sleeve with the white lid.
description_view_1: Angled view with partial 'GREGORYS COFFEE' text visible, focusing more on the side of the cup.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the stylized face logo with glasses and hair, with the lid's drinking slot visible.
description_view_3: Angled view of the logo side, showing the logo partially and the curve of the cup.
